title: 2026-02-20 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 6.39
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2026-02-20: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 6.39/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and front-end rate pressure shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2026-02-20, the score printed 6.39/100 in the low regime, with volatility and front-end rate pressure doing most of the work.
